summary: Completed comprehensive testing of final features: Identity Verification flow (ID, selfie, phone OTP), Scam Detection system (risk assessment, flagged users/transactions), and Trust Score tooltips. All 21 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/verification/status - returns verification status with id_verified, selfie_verified, phone_verified, fully_verified fields
✅ GET /api/verification/status - requires authentication (401 without auth)
✅ POST /api/verification/id - uploads ID document successfully
✅ POST /api/verification/id - requires authentication
✅ POST /api/verification/selfie - uploads selfie successfully
✅ POST /api/verification/selfie - requires authentication
✅ POST /api/verification/phone/send-otp - sends OTP (MOCKED to console)
✅ POST /api/verification/phone/send-otp - validates phone number (rejects invalid)
✅ POST /api/verification/phone/send-otp - requires authentication
✅ POST /api/verification/phone/verify-otp - rejects wrong OTP code
✅ POST /api/verification/phone/verify-otp - requires authentication
✅ GET /api/admin/flagged-users - admin can access high-risk users list
✅ GET /api/admin/flagged-users - returns 403 for non-admin
✅ GET /api/admin/flagged-users - returns 401/403 without auth
✅ GET /api/admin/flagged-transactions - admin can access flagged transactions
✅ GET /api/admin/flagged-transactions - returns 403 for non-admin
✅ POST /api/transactions - includes risk_level and risk_flags in response
✅ GET /api/risk/user/{user_id} - user can view own risk assessment
✅ GET /api/risk/user/{user_id} - admin can view any user's risk
✅ GET /api/risk/user/{user_id} - non-admin cannot view other user's risk (403)
✅ GET /api/users/{user_id}/profile - returns trust score breakdown metrics
✅ Trust Score Breakdown UI - displays all 4 metrics with info icons
✅ Trust Score Tooltips - hover displays tooltip with metric explanation
✅ Identity Verification page - 3-step progress UI (ID, Selfie, Phone)
✅ Identity Verification page - Benefits of Verification section visible
✅ Transaction Detail - High Risk Warning card displayed for high-risk transactions
✅ Transaction Detail - Risk warning shows 'Please verify the other party's identity'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Final features fully tested: 1) Identity Verification - 3-step flow with /api/verification/id, /api/verification/selfie, /api/verification/phone/send-otp, /api/verification/phone/verify-otp endpoints. OTP is MOCKED (logged to console). Status tracked via /api/verification/status. User becomes 'verified' with badge after all 3 steps. 2) Scam Detection - Risk assessment runs on transaction creation (assess_transaction_risk function). Risk levels: low/medium/high based on score 0-100. Flags include: new_account_high_value, multiple_disputes, unverified_high_value, low_trust_score. Admin endpoints: /api/admin/flagged-users, /api/admin/flagged-transactions. 3) Trust Score Tooltips - HelpCircle icons next to each metric in UserProfile.js with Tooltip component from shadcn/ui. Metrics: Transaction History (4pts per trade, max 40), User Ratings (6pts per star, max 30), Dispute Record (starts 20, -5 per dispute), Verification Status (+10 for verified).

mocked_apis.note: SMS OTP sending is MOCKED via logger.info() - not sent to actual phone numbers

identity_verification_api.model: VerificationStatus with fields: id_verified, id_document_path, selfie_verified, selfie_path, phone_verified, phone_number, fully_verified

risk_warning_ui.display: Card with AlertTriangle icon, red/amber background based on risk level

messages.high: High Risk Transaction - Our system has flagged potential risks...

trust_score_tooltips_ui.location: UserProfile page - Trust Score Breakdown section

metrics_with_tooltips.name: Transaction History
metrics_with_tooltips.tooltip: Earn 4 points for each successful trade. Maximum 40 points (10 trades).

metrics_with_tooltips.name: User Ratings
metrics_with_tooltips.tooltip: Based on average star rating from other users. 6 points per star, maximum 30 points.

metrics_with_tooltips.name: Dispute Record
metrics_with_tooltips.tooltip: Tracks disputes ruled against this user. Starts at 20 points, -5 per valid dispute.

metrics_with_tooltips.name: Verification Status
metrics_with_tooltips.tooltip: 10 bonus points for completing identity verification (ID, selfie, phone number).
